generator: vv flowdoc spike (translated for Phase 1 of flowdoc-command epic)

nodes.label: hook
nodes.role: Claude Code hook handler + plugin installer

nodes.label: mcp
nodes.role: MCP JSON-RPC server, tool dispatch, prompts

nodes.label: vaultsync
nodes.role: git wrapper around the Obsidian vault repo

nodes.label: templates
nodes.role: go:embed of templates/ tree (incl. slash-cmd md)

nodes.label: wraprender
nodes.role: Marker-block renderer for resume.md state regions

nodes.label: sessionclaim
nodes.role: Per-host session-slot lock for multi-host disambig

nodes.label: Claude Code (host)
nodes.role: External: editor/agent — fires hooks, calls MCP

flows.label: /restart (session bootstrap)
flows.description: Surface handshake, multi-host vault sync, orphan-worktree sweep, then load resume/workflow/active-tasks into the Claude Code session.
flows.elided: Plan-sweep details (Glob ~/.claude/plans/, slugify, vv_manage_task create) treated as a single step; auto-retire pass abbreviated.
flows.entry_point: Claude Code expands the templates/agentctx/commands/restart.md prompt body.

steps.op: compare binary MCPSurfaceVersion vs vault stamps

flows.label: /wrap (iteration capture)
flows.description: Pre-flight + collect-state + orchestrator-composed narrative + mechanical apply (append-iteration, stamp-iter, commit.msg) + vault sync. NOTE: contrary to the spec brief, there is NO LLM dispatch / tiered providers in /wrap — DESIGN #92/#93 retired that path. Claude Code itself writes the prose inline.
flows.elided: Thread/carried mutations only fire conditionally; merge-pattern feature-branch variant omitted (happy path is single-branch, fresh-feature shape).

steps.op: git in project dir: anchor sha, commits, diff names
ORCHESTRATOR composes narrative inline (no LLM dispatch)

flows.label: vv hook (SessionEnd/Stop/PreCompact)
flows.description: Claude Code fires this on every session-lifecycle event with JSON over stdin. We parse the transcript, write an Obsidian note into host-local staging, optionally enrich via LLM, optionally run synthesis, and refresh per-project context docs.
flows.elided: Stop/PreCompact path skips enrichment (Checkpoint=true, SkipEnrichment=true) — captured here as the happy SessionEnd path.
flows.entry_point: claude-code spawns `vv hook --event SessionEnd` and pipes JSON on stdin

steps.op: exec `vv hook` + write JSON to stdin
(if cfg.Synthesis.Enabled) Run with LLM, index, note path
append Knowledge/learnings, flag stale, update resume

flows.label: vv inject (CLAUDE.md fallback context)
flows.description: Builds the bootstrap blob Claude Code injects into CLAUDE.md when MCP isn't available. Walks the session index for the detected project, computes trends, renders sections (summary/sessions/threads/decisions/friction) within a token budget.
flows.elided: Section truncation and per-section formatting details kept high-level.

steps.op: Render (md or json) within token budget

flows.label: vv check (surface handshake + toolchain probes)
flows.description: Runs the per-vault and per-project probes plus the binary-vs-vault MCP surface-version handshake (DESIGN #97). --json mode also embeds the binary's tool count by booting an in-process MCP server and counting registered tools.
flows.elided: Each individual probe (obsidian, projects, state, index, domains, enrichment, synthesis, hook, agentctx schema) is one box per probe in our viz — not 11 separate steps.

steps.op: (--json only) boot in-process MCP, count tools

flows.label: vv index (rebuild session-index.json)
flows.description:
Walks Projects/

/sessions/ across hosts, rebuilds session-index.json, then regenerates per-project history.md (the context doc consumed by inject/bootstrap).

flows.label: vv vault pull
flows.description: Auto-installs the surface merge driver, runs `git pull --rebase` on the vault repo, regenerates auto-generated files if the rebase touched them, and reports any DroppedUpstream content for `vv vault recover`.

flows.label: vv vault push
flows.description: Stages all dirty paths (or only --paths X --paths Y), creates one commit, and pushes to all configured remotes in a single network round-trip. Reports per-remote success/failure.

steps.op: git push to each configured remote

flows.label: vv vault status
flows.description: Reports current branch, dirty state, and ahead/behind per remote for the vault git repo.

flows.label: vv vault sync-sessions
flows.description:
Mirrors each host-local staging dir into /Projects/

/sessions//, writes per-host index.json, and creates one LOCAL commit per project. No network push (deferred to `vv vault push`).

flows.label: vv mcp install
flows.description: Auto-detects Claude Code (~/.claude/) and/or Zed (~/.config/zed/) and registers vibe-vault as an MCP server. With --claude-plugin uses the plugin marketplace path that works around Claude Code bug #2682.
flows.elided: Zed-only branch and uninstall path treated as variants of the same flow.

flows.label: vv mcp check
flows.description: Boots an in-process MCP server, registers all tools, and runs the self-check suite (manifest validity, prompt registration, surface gate readiness).

flows.label: vv config set-key
flows.description: Validates a provider API key (anthropic|openai|google|grok), then atomically writes it into ~/.config/vibe-vault/config.toml with 0600 permissions. Refuses to overwrite without --force.

flows.label: vv backfill (older sessions)
flows.description: Discovers transcripts under ~/.claude/projects/ that aren't in session-index.json yet, captures them through the same session pipeline `vv hook` uses (but staging-rooted), and patches missing TranscriptPath fields on existing entries.
flows.elided: Per-entry skip/error reporting collapsed into one summary step.

flows.label: vv archive (compress old transcripts)
flows.description: Iterates the session index and zstd-compresses each transcript JSONL into <state>/archive/, reporting size delta. Idempotent: already-archived entries are skipped.

flows.label: vv reprocess (re-enrich a session)
flows.description: Walks the index, optionally filtered by --project / --source, and re-runs session.Capture with an LLM provider so previously-heuristic notes pick up enrichment. Has a --backfill-context shortcut to populate ContextAvailable on entries without LLM cost.
flows.elided: Dry-run reporting and Zed-source re-capture branch (reprocessZedEntry) noted as variants — happy path is Claude Code source.

flows.label: vv stats
flows.description: Load the session index, optionally filter by --source, compute per-project counters, and print a human table.

flows.label: vv friction
flows.description: Same shape as `vv stats` but aggregates the per-session friction score (extracted at enrichment time) into per-project rankings.

flows.label: vv trends
flows.description: Rolling-window trend report (weekly buckets by default) showing direction of friction / volume / topics over recent sessions.

flows.label: vv context init
flows.description: First-time agentctx scaffolding for the current project: writes .vibe-vault.toml marker, creates vault Projects/<project>/agentctx/ dir, drops template files (workflow, resume, iterations).

flows.label: vv context migrate
flows.description: Migrate an existing local-only agentctx tree (e.g. legacy .agentctx/) into the vault layout under Projects/<project>/agentctx/. Preserves local copies for manual cleanup.

steps.op: copy/move existing local agentctx → vault path

flows.label: vv context sync
flows.description: Re-stamp embedded shared commands/templates into every (or one) project's agentctx tree, advancing schema version where needed. Dry-run mode prints diffs without writing.
